identity: Otherworldly human female chronomancer, long silver-white hair flowing unnaturally as if underwater, glowing pale-gold eyes, porcelain pale skin, delicate build. Faint gold clock-hand tattoos on her arms.
outfit: Purple-and-gold layered robes patterned with clock faces and gold gear-motifs, a gold sash with hanging hourglass charms, a long trailing open overcoat. Barefoot, feet floating just above the ground.
weapons: A golden pocketwatch hovering above her open left palm, its hands spinning; no held staff or weapon.
attackStyle: East-facing. Right hand thrust forward, a ripple of gold-purple time-energy and floating clock-hands erupting outward. Hair floats.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both hands raised, hovering hourglass rotating between them with gold sand falling upward, clock-faces orbiting around.
blockStyle: East-facing. Both arms raised, a translucent gold clock-face forming in front as a shield, gears visible.
koStyle: East-facing, floating slumped in mid-air an inch above the ground, hourglass fallen beside her, hair splayed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), ethereal idle. Hovering pocketwatch above left palm, right hand at her side. Hair floating upward gently.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Silver-white floating hair, pale-gold glowing eyes, purple-and-gold clock-patterned robes, hovering pocketwatch visible.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Otherworldly human female chronomancer, long silver-white hair flowing unnaturally as if underwater, glowing pale-gold eyes, porcelain pale skin, delicate build. Faint gold clock-hand tattoos on her arms.

OUTFIT: Purple-and-gold layered robes patterned with clock faces and gold gear-motifs, a gold sash with hanging hourglass charms, a long trailing open overcoat. Barefoot, feet floating just above the ground.

WEAPONS: A golden pocketwatch hovering above her open left palm, its hands spinning; no held staff or weapon.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Otherworldly human female chronomancer, long silver-white hair flowing unnaturally as if underwater, glowing pale-gold eyes, porcelain pale skin, delicate build. Faint gold clock-hand tattoos on her arms.

OUTFIT: Purple-and-gold layered robes patterned with clock faces and gold gear-motifs, a gold sash with hanging hourglass charms, a long trailing open overcoat. Barefoot, feet floating just above the ground.

WEAPONS: A golden pocketwatch hovering above her open left palm, its hands spinning; no held staff or weapon.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Silver-white floating hair, pale-gold glowing eyes, purple-and-gold clock-patterned robes, hovering pocketwatch visible.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
